home.title: Latest News Feed
home.description: The most recent analyses and updates on the political and economic landscape.
home.welcomeIntro: An open-source platform for simulating policies, exploring public data, and verifying facts. Your tool for informed citizenship.
home.methodologyDesc: We are committed to impartiality and transparency. All our analyses are generated from official public data sources, without partisan bias, ensuring you receive neutral and reliable information.
home.regionalDesc: Dive into the data and discover the economic and social disparities that define the country.

errors.subjectMin: Subject must be at least 5 characters.
errors.messageMin: Message must be at least 20 characters.

about.title: About Demokratia
about.subtitle: Your compass for politics and economy in Portugal.
about.missionDesc: Our mission is to strengthen democracy and informed citizenship in Portugal by providing data analysis and policy simulation tools that are accessible, transparent, and rigorously neutral. We believe that a well-informed electorate is the foundation of a more just and prosperous society.
about.teamDesc: We are a team of engineers, data analysts, and public policy experts united by a passion for transparency and technology. We have no party affiliation, and our sole commitment is to the accuracy and clarity of information.
about.neutralityDesc: Our analyses are generated by algorithms that consult official data sources. There is no room for opinion or political bias on our platform.
about.transparencyDesc: We always cite the original sources of our data and explain the methodology behind our simulations and analyses.
about.innovationDesc: We apply the latest artificial intelligence technologies to make public information more accessible and useful for all citizens.
about.commitmentDesc: Portugal faces complex challenges in 2026. Housing, demography, and fiscal competitiveness are issues that require data, not ideologies. Demokratia provides the compass for every citizen to navigate the current political landscape with critical independence.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Quick answers about the platform and data transparency.
faq.a1: Demokratia is a civic tech platform that uses Artificial Intelligence to analyze public data and simulate the impact of policies. Our goal is to make political and economic information more accessible and transparent for all citizens.
faq.a2: Yes. Our AI is based on RAG models (Retrieval-Augmented Generation), which means it does not generate opinions or fabricated information. Instead, it consults a vast set of official data sources (like INE, Pordata, DRE, etc.) in real-time to build its analyses. All sources are cited.
faq.q3: Is there any cost to use the platform?
faq.a3: No. Demokratia is and will always be free to access. We believe civic information is a fundamental right. The platform is funded through programmatic advertising (Google AdSense) to cover infrastructure and computing costs.
faq.q4: Can I use the data and charts for my own projects?
faq.a4: Yes. We encourage the use of our data and visualizations for research, education, or journalism purposes. Most of our datasets can be exported in CSV format. We only ask that you cite 'Demokratia.pt' as the source.
faq.q5: How can I suggest new data?
faq.a5: You can use the 'Suggest New Source' button in the Data Explorer or send us a direct message through our contact page.
faq.a6: Yes. We use Google AdSense to fund server and AI processing costs, ensuring that access to information remains free for everyone.
faq.footerSubtitle: Our team is ready to help with any technical or data questions.

login.subtitle: Sign in to access personalized simulations and save your proposals.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: By accessing and using the Demokratia platform, the user agrees to comply with these Terms of Service and our Privacy Policy. These terms apply to all visitors, users, and others who access or use the Service. If you do not agree with any part of the terms, you may not access the service. Your continued use of the platform after the posting of any changes to these terms will be deemed acceptance of those changes.
terms.aiDesc: Demokratia uses Artificial Intelligence (AI) models, including Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) technology, to generate analyses, summaries, and simulations from public and official data sources. While we strive to ensure the accuracy and neutrality of all AI-generated information, we cannot guarantee that it is completely free of errors or omissions. The information provided by the AI does not constitute legal, financial, or any other professional advice. The user should independently verify any information on which they intend to rely.
terms.usageDesc: The user agrees not to use the platform for any illegal or prohibited purpose under these terms. You agree not to use the service in any manner that could damage, disable, overburden, or impair the platform, or interfere with any other party's use and enjoyment of the service. Activities such as introducing viruses, attempting to gain unauthorized access to our systems, or using bots or scrapers to bulk-extract data are strictly prohibited.
terms.ipDesc: All original content, features, and functionality of the platform, including the design, text, graphics, logos, and underlying source code, are and will remain the exclusive property of Demokratia and its licensors. AI-generated content for the user may be used freely for informational, educational, ou journalistic purposes, provided that Demokratia.pt is clearly cited as the source. The platform itself is protected by copyright, trademark, and other laws of Portugal and foreign countries.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Demokratia is committed to protecting the privacy of the citizens who use our data transparency platform.
privacy.dataDesc: We collect information strictly necessary for the operation and improvement of the platform:

dataItems.account: Account data (Name and Email via Google Login).
dataItems.history: Search and simulation history (for registered users only).
dataItems.technical: Technical navigation data (IP address, browser type).
dataItems.anonymous: Anonymous usage data for traffic analysis (via Google Analytics).

privacy.cookiesDesc: We use cookies for essential functionalities and to fund the platform through advertising.
privacy.adsenseP1: Google, as a third-party vendor, uses cookies to serve ads on our site. Google's use of the DoubleClick cookie enables it to serve ads to our users based on their visit to Demokratia and other sites on the Internet.
privacy.adsenseP2: Users may opt out of the use of the DoubleClick cookie by visiting the Google ad settings.
privacy.purposeDesc: We use the data to improve the AI engine, personalize economic simulations, and ensure that fact-checks are relevant to the community.
privacy.rightsDesc1: Under the GDPR, you have the right to access, rectify, or erase your data. To exercise these rights, please visit your
privacy.contactLinkText: contact us via the support form
privacy.aiDesc: Demokratia is an educational platform that uses Artificial Intelligence models (Google Gemini and others) to generate analyses, simulations, and fact-checks based on public data. All AI-generated content is clearly identified as such and is intended exclusively for informational and educational purposes. Demokratia does not use AI to create misinformation, misleading content, or to replace professional advice.
privacy.controllerDesc: Under the GDPR (General Data Protection Regulation), the controller responsible for processing your personal data is:

cookies.title: Cookie Preferences
cookies.desc: We use cookies to ensure the site works, analyse traffic, and show relevant advertising. You can accept all, reject non-essential ones, or customise. Learn more in our
cookies.essentialDesc: Required for the site to function (authentication, sidebar state, preferences). Cannot be disabled.
cookies.analyticsDesc: Help us understand how users interact with the platform (Google Analytics / Firebase Analytics).
cookies.advertisingDesc: Used by Google AdSense to show relevant ads and fund the platform.

cookiePage.title: Cookie Policy
cookiePage.whatDesc: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They allow the site to remember your preferences and improve your browsing experience.
cookiePage.essentialDesc: Indispensable for the site to function. They include authentication, language preferences, and interface state. They do not require consent.
cookiePage.analyticsFullDesc: Allow us to anonymously measure and analyse traffic and user behaviour to continuously improve the platform. Only activated with your consent.
cookiePage.advertisingFullDesc: Allow Google AdSense to personalise the ads shown to you based on your interests. Only activated with your consent. Demokratia publishes an ads.txt file at demokratia.pt/ads.txt identifying Google (pub-9018474620860214) as the only authorised advertising seller on this site.

table.name: Name
table.consentPurpose: Stores the user's cookie consent preferences.
table.sidebarPurpose: Remembers the open/closed state of the sidebar.
table.authPurpose: Keeps the user's authentication session active.
table.gaPurpose: Registers a unique ID to distinguish users and calculate sessions.
table.gaSessionPurpose: Used by Google Analytics 4 to maintain session state.
table.adsensePurpose: Used by Google for ad personalisation and conversion measurement.
table.testCookiePurpose: Checks whether the browser accepts cookies, used by Google DoubleClick.

cookiePage.controlDesc: You have several ways to manage the use of cookies on this site:
cookiePage.controlBanner: Use our cookie preference panel to accept, reject, or customise categories.
cookiePage.controlBrowser: Configure your browser to block or delete cookies — see your browser's documentation for details.
cookiePage.controlGoogle: Visit Google Ad Settings to opt out of ad personalisation.
cookiePage.contactDesc: If you have any questions about our cookie policy, please contact us via the support form on the Contact page.

proposals.title: Citizen Proposals
proposals.description: A space for citizens to present and debate proposals that can be simulated and analyzed on our platform.
proposals.howItWorks: Submit a clear and concise proposal. The proposals most voted on by the community gain prominence and may be selected for a detailed impact analysis by our team of economists and our AI.
proposals.titleMinError: Title must be at least 10 characters.
proposals.descMinError: Description must be at least 30 characters.

footer.desc: AI-powered analysis of public policies and economic data, promoting transparency and informed citizenship.
footer.disclaimer: Disclaimer: The analyses and simulations provided on this platform are generated by AI based on public data and should be considered for informational purposes only. They do not constitute financial, legal, or any other form of professional advice.

methodology.description: Understand how Demokratia combines classic economic models with Artificial Intelligence to analyze the complex puzzle of politics and economics.
methodology.sourcesDescription: We are committed to full transparency. All our analyses are based on public and official data sources. Explore the sources that feed our models.
methodology.disclaimer: The analyses and simulations provided on this platform are generated by AI based on public data and should be considered for informational purposes only. For more details, please see our

sourcing.title: Data Sourcing and Collection
sourcing.content: Our AI consults in real-time a vast set of official and public data sources, such as the National Statistics Institute (INE), Pordata, Bank of Portugal, Eurostat, and the Diário da República. We do not use opinion-based or partisan sources.

ai.title: Artificial Intelligence (AI) Integration
ai.content: We use advanced language models (LLMs) with the Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) technique. This means the AI does not invent answers; it generates analyses, summaries, and simulations based exclusively on the data from the sources it consults. This approach ensures the information is factually grounded.

processing.title: Processing and Analysis
processing.content: When a user asks a question or starts a simulation, our AI interprets the request, identifies the most relevant data sources, extracts the necessary information, and then constructs a coherent and contextualized response. The process is designed to be fast, efficient, and accurate.

validation.title: Validation and Quality
validation.content: We have several mechanisms to ensure quality. All data sources are cited. We have implemented a refutation system that allows users to challenge the generated information, which is then reviewed by our team. We continuously monitor the models' performance to detect and correct inaccuracies.

ethics.title: Ethical Considerations and Neutrality
ethics.content: Our commitment is to neutrality and impartiality. The platform was built to have no political or ideological affiliation. Our mission is to provide citizens with the facts and tools so they can form their own opinions in an informed and independent way.

refutation.title: Contest or Refute Information
refutation.description: If you believe this AI-generated information is incorrect, incomplete, or requires additional context, please submit your refutation with evidence. All submissions are reviewed by our team.
refutation.loginPrompt: Please log in to submit a refutation.
refutation.label: Your refutation or contextualization
refutation.placeholder: Clearly and objectively explain the error or what is missing in the AI analysis...
refutation.textMinError: The refutation must have at least 20 characters.
refutation.success: Your refutation was submitted successfully and is pending review. Thank you for your contribution!

simulations.title: Policy Impact Simulator
simulations.description: Analyze the potential impact of a measure or public policy. Our AI will generate a detailed analysis of the possible consequences.
simulations.input_placeholder: Ex: Increase of the minimum wage to €900
simulations.simulating_message: The AI is analyzing the policy... This may take a few seconds.
simulations.results_confidence_desc: This value represents the AI model's confidence in its own analysis, based on data quality and policy complexity.
simulations.no_simulations_desc: You haven't run any simulations yet. Use the form above to get started.
simulations.loginRequired: You need to sign in to run a simulation.

factCheck.title: AI-Powered Fact-Check
factCheck.description: Verify the truthfulness of a political or economic claim.
factCheck.howItWorks: Our Fact-Checking tool uses an advanced AI model that queries a vast set of data sources in real-time (governmental, news, statistical institutes) to assess the veracity of a claim. The analysis considers temporal context and language nuances. The system assigns one of four possible verdicts: True, False, Misleading, or No Evidence.
factCheck.cardDesc: Enter the claim you want to check in the field below.
factCheck.textareaPlaceholder: Ex: The minimum wage in Portugal is higher than the European Union average.
factCheck.footerNotice: The AI uses official sources and analyzes the history of corrections to validate the claim.
factCheck.aiDisclaimer: Information generated by AI based on rigorous analysis of public sources and updated temporal context.
factCheck.recentChecksDesc: Explore the latest claims verified by the community and our AI.
factCheck.historyDesc: Your most recent checks. You can reload or delete them.
factCheck.loginPrompt: Log in to see your check history.
factCheck.noHistoryDesc: Start by entering a claim in the checker above.

legislation.title: Legislation Consultation
legislation.description: Ask a question about Portuguese legislation and our AI will search and summarize the relevant information for you.
legislation.howItWorks: Our legislative consultation tool uses an AI model that accesses the Diário da República database in real-time to answer your questions. The AI interprets your question, searches for relevant legal diplomas, and generates a consolidated, easy-to-understand answer, always citing the sources.
legislation.cardDesc: Write your question about a law, decree, or ordinance.
legislation.textareaPlaceholder: Ex: What are the new rules for remote work in 2024?

scenarios.title: Macroeconomic Scenarios
scenarios.description: Simulate the impact of different fiscal and budget policies on the Portuguese economy.
scenarios.howItWorks: This tool allows you to simulate the impact of changes in macroeconomic and budgetary variables. The calculations are based on a simplified econometric model and the results are indicative. For a detailed analysis, use the AI assessment.
scenarios.saveDesc: Save this scenario to view it later or share it.
scenarios.suggestIndicatorDesc: Would you like to simulate the impact of other variables? Leave us your suggestion.
scenarios.suggestPlaceholder: Ex: I would like to see the impact of changing the budget for Culture or Science...
scenarios.errorAiOverloaded: Our AI engine seems to be overloaded. Please try again later.
scenarios.errorAiGeneric: An error occurred while processing the analysis. Our team has been notified.

budget.title: Budget Items Management (B€)
budget.description: Redistribute the public expenditure of the OE2026.

popovers.irs: Personal Income Tax. Changing the average rate simulates a change in the tax burden on households.
popovers.iva: Value Added Tax. It directly affects prices and inflation (Art. 18 of CIVA).
popovers.irc: Corporate Income Tax. It affects competitiveness and the attraction of foreign investment.
popovers.smn: The SMN in 2026 reflects the appreciation trajectory agreed upon in social concertation.
popovers.health: Investment in the National Health Service. It affects the quality of service and waiting times.
popovers.education: Investment in schools, universities, and research. It has a long-term impact on GDP.
popovers.social: Pensions, subsidies, and social support. It is the largest item of public expenditure.
popovers.infra: Investment in railways, ports, and energy. Essential for national productivity.

irs.title: IRS Simulator 2024
irs.description: Calculate your 2024 income tax and receive a detailed fiscal analysis and personalized optimization tips.
irs.prompt: Fill in the fields and click 'Calculate & Analyze' to see your tax projection.

capitalGains.title: Capital Gains (Category G)
capitalGains.isPrimaryResidence: Sale of a Permanent Primary Residence

popovers.maritalStatus: Marital status and the taxation option (joint or separate) influence the Family Quotient, which divides the taxable income to determine the applicable tax rate (Art. 69 of the CIRS).
popovers.dependents: Each dependent provides a fixed deduction from the IRS tax liability, increasing your refund or decreasing the tax to be paid (Art. 78-A of the CIRS).
popovers.incapacity: Individuals with a permanent disability degree of 60% or more are entitled to specific deductions from their tax liability, which can significantly reduce the tax (Art. 87 of the CIRS).

budget.title: Smart Family Budget
budget.description: Control your finances, set goals, and get AI-driven insights to optimize your savings.

reporting.title: Reports & Charts
reporting.noData: Not enough data to generate charts.

profile.deleteWarning: This action is irreversible. All your data, including simulations and history, will be permanently deleted.
profile.deletingDesc: This may take a few moments. You will be redirected when it is finished.

admin.deleteSourceDesc: This action will permanently remove the data source from the system.
admin.messagesDesc: Manage messages sent by users through the contact form.

aiQuota.title: Official Notice: Artificial Intelligence Quota Exhausted
aiQuota.description: Due to the high number of accesses and because this is a project managed exclusively by civic goodwill, without any funding, our monthly AI quota has been exhausted. New content generation features are temporarily disabled until the beginning of next month. All previously generated content through our vast community participation remains fully available.

explorer.title: Data Explorer
explorer.description: Search public statistics or explore our datasets.
explorer.howItWorks: This tool uses generative AI to interpret natural language requests, search official data sources, and present the results in chart or table format. The pre-loaded data is fictional and for demonstration purposes only.
explorer.aiCardDesc: Ask for a statistic and the AI will try to find it.
explorer.textareaPlaceholder: Example: Unemployment rate in Portugal for the last 5 years
explorer.noDataFound: No data was found for your request.
explorer.trySimulator: Your question might be better suited for a simulation.
explorer.officialFooter: The AI searches in real-time from sources like INE, Pordata, Eurostat, Bank of Portugal, and others. The original source is always cited.
explorer.officialSourcesDesc: Governmental and statistical data sources that power our platform.
explorer.saveViewDesc: Save the current configuration for future reference.
explorer.suggestSourceDesc: Found a useful data source? Share it with us.
explorer.sourceNamePlaceholder: Ex: Pordata, INE, Bank of Portugal
explorer.sourcePurpose: Source Purpose (what data does it provide?)
explorer.sourcePurposePlaceholder: Explain what kind of factual data this source provides...

map.title: Interactive Regional Map
map.description: Explore Portugal's regional disparities through socioeconomic indicators.
map.selectDistrict: Select a district on the map.

prompts.expertInLaw: You are an expert in Portuguese law.
prompts.factChecker: You are a world-class fact-checker specializing in Portuguese political and economic claims.
prompts.analyst: You are a world-class economist and political analyst specializing in the Portuguese economy.
prompts.newsAnalyst: You are a Portuguese political and economic news analyst.
prompts.taxExpert: You are a world-class Portuguese tax law expert.
prompts.dataRetriever: You are a data retrieval expert for Portuguese public statistics.
prompts.dataVisualizer: You are a data visualization expert.
prompts.financialAdvisor: You are a world-class financial advisor specializing in Portuguese family budgets.
prompts.investmentAnalyst: You are a world-class financial analyst providing investment advice for the Portuguese market.

instructions.claimToVerify: The user-submitted claim to verify is: "{{claim}}".
instructions.todayIs: Today's date is {{date}}. Your analysis must be based on information available up to this date.
instructions.translateTo: Translate the following text from Portuguese to {{lang}}.
instructions.jsonOutput: Your output MUST be a JSON object that conforms to the following Zod schema:
instructions.jsonOnly: IMPORTANT: Your response must be only a valid JSON object, with no extra text, comments, or markdown formatting.
instructions.textOnly: Your response must be ONLY the translated text, with no extra comments or formatting.
instructions.newsFeedTask: Your task is to generate a feed of the 5 most important and recent topics in Portugal.
instructions.findData: If you find the data, set isFound to true and provide the data as a JSON.stringified array of objects.
instructions.dataNotFound: If you cannot find the specific data, set isFound to false.
instructions.chartable: If chartable, set isChartable to true and format the data.
instructions.notChartable: If not chartable, set isChartable to false.

errors.noResponse: AI did not return a response.
errors.noResponseFor: AI did not return a response for {{context}}.
errors.schemaMismatch: AI response does not match the required schema.
errors.schemaMismatchFor: AI response for {{context}} does not match the required schema.
errors.translationFailed: AI did not return a translation.

gdp.label: GDP (Gross Domestic Product)
gdp.description: Year-on-year change in Gross Domestic Product in Portugal. Consolidated data until 2025 and estimates for 2026 based on the OE2026.

unemployment.label: Unemployment Rate
unemployment.description: Average annual unemployment rate in Portugal. Reflects the stabilization of the labor market in 2026.

inflation.label: Inflation Rate (HICP)
inflation.description: Year-on-year rate of change of the Harmonized Index of Consumer Prices. Values for 2026 show a return to the ECB's target.

average-monthly-earnings-2026.title: Average Monthly Earnings per Worker
average-monthly-earnings-2026.description: Evolution of the gross average monthly earnings of employees. In 2026, a convergence with the European average is observed following the SMN updates.

companies-by-size-2026.title: Companies by Staff Size
companies-by-size-2026.description: Distribution of the Portuguese business fabric by number of workers in 2026. Highlight on the growth of medium-sized technology companies.

government-debt-2026.title: Public Debt as % of GDP (2021-2026)
government-debt-2026.description: Trajectory of the Portuguese public debt. In 2026, Portugal maintains the trend of reduction below the Euro Zone average.

residence-permits-2026.title: Residence Permits Issued and Renewed
residence-permits-2026.description: Statistics on the issuance and renewal of residence permits in Portugal. Data from 2026 reflect the streamlining of integration processes and the strengthening of the agency's response capacity.
residence-permits-2026.source: AIMA - Agency for Integration, Migrations and Asylum 2026

doctors-sns-2026.title: Doctors in the National Health Service (SNS)
doctors-sns-2026.description: Number of doctors in the SNS by specialty. Reflects the 2026 budget increase for talent retention.

early-school-leaving-2026.title: Early School Leaving Rate
early-school-leaving-2026.description: Percentage of young people (18-24 years) who have not completed secondary education. Portugal reaches historic lows in 2026.

higher-education-enrollment-2026.title: Students Enrolled in Higher Education
higher-education-enrollment-2026.description: Total number of students enrolled in universities and polytechnics. Growth driven by AI and Energy Transition courses.

emigration-stats-2026.title: Emigration and Return Flows
emigration-stats-2026.description: Statistics on the departure of national citizens and the impact of the "Regressar 2.0" program in 2026.

parties.title: Political Parties
parties.subtitle: Directory of Political Forces
parties.description: A strictly neutral and encyclopedic directory to get to know the national political spectrum, its history, and core values.
parties.aboutContent: The content presented is maintained based on a policy of rigorous impartiality and encyclopedic neutrality. The objective of this section is solely educational, helping citizens understand the historical context and proposals of different parties, without any analytical bias or editorial approval from the Demokratia platform.

library.title: Library
library.description: A knowledge archive with articles, studies, and models on economics and sociology.
library.searchPlaceholder: Search articles by title or description...
library.noResults: No articles were found for your search.
library.recommendedBooksDesc: A selection of fundamental works (focusing on open archive and public domain).

instituicoes.title: Institutions and Organs of Power
instituicoes.subtitle: The pillars of Portuguese democracy: functions, limits and cycles of power.
instituicoes.intro: Portugal is a sovereign Republic, based on the dignity of the human person and the popular will, organized as a democratic rule of law. Political power resides in the people, who exercise it through universal suffrage and the institutions provided for in the Constitution.

pr.title: President of the Republic
pr.desc: Represents the Portuguese Republic, guarantees national independence, the unity of the State and the regular functioning of democratic institutions.
pr.election: In elected by direct and universal suffrage for a 5-year term. Can serve a maximum of two consecutive terms.

powers.title: Main Competencies
powers.p1: Veto of laws (political or due to unconstitutionality).
powers.p2: Dissolution of the Assembly of the Republic and calling elections.
powers.p3: Appointment of the Prime Minister (hearing the parties with parliamentary seats).
powers.p4: Supreme Command of the Armed Forces.

ar.title: Assembly of the Republic
ar.desc: The representative assembly of all Portuguese citizens, composed of 230 deputies elected by electoral circles.
ar.election: 4-year term (legislature), except in case of early dissolution.

powers.title: Main Competencies
powers.p1: Approval of laws and revision of the Constitution.
powers.p2: Supervision of the Government and Public Administration.

gov.title: Government
gov.desc: The organ for conducting the general policy of the country and the superior organ of the public administration.
gov.composition: Composed of the Prime Minister, Ministers and Secretaries of State.

powers.title: Main Competencies
powers.p1: Execution of laws and the State Budget.
powers.p3: Management of public services and State property.

courts.title: Courts
courts.desc: Sovereignty organs with competence to administer justice in the name of the people, ensuring the defense of legally protected rights and interests.
courts.independence: Judges are independent and immovable, and cannot be held responsible for their decisions.

instituicoes.legalBasis: Legal Basis: Constitution of the Portuguese Republic (CRP), Part III - Organization of Political Power.
